Summarized_Articles.Title: Is Tesla cooked?

Summarized_Articles.Title: How the Tesla brand turned so toxic
Summarized_Articles.Summary: Today we’re talking about the protests against Tesla, which have been branded on social media under the hashtag Tesla Takedown. The protests are, of course, a reaction to Elon Musk, who has managed to install himself as basically a not-so-shadow president who…

Summarized_Articles.Title: US attorney general re-announces ‘severe’ charges against alleged Tesla arsonists
Summarized_Articles.Summary: As reports of vandalism and even a supposed doxing website targeting Tesla locations and vehicles continue to appear, Attorney General Pam Bondi issued a new warning about old crimes. In a Department of Justice press release, she “announced charges against th…

Summarized_Articles.Title: Tesla Got a Permit to Operate a Taxi Service in California—but There's a Catch
Summarized_Articles.Summary: The taxi service will initially operate with Tesla employee drivers only, use current-model vehicles, and won't allow for driverless rides.

Summarized_Articles.Title: Ford’s Tesla Supercharger adapters are now on sale for $200
Summarized_Articles.Summary: Ford is making some changes to how it handles its EV charging accessories. The company was the first to announce its plans to adopt Tesla’s North American Charging Standard (NACS) connector for its EVs, and was also first to distribute NACS adapters to its EV…

Summarized_Articles.Title: Tesla Superchargers coming to dozens of Steak ‘n Shake locations
Summarized_Articles.Summary: Tesla is planning to install dozens of Supercharger sites at Steak ‘n Shake locations across the country, according to an exchange between the companies on X. The companies have signed an agreement for over six sites, with over 20 more to come. And if Steak ‘…

Summarized_Articles.Title: Ford Is Sticking With an EV Future
Summarized_Articles.Summary: CEO Jim Farley tells us that every qualified owner of a Ford electric car has received an adaptor that allows them to charge up at Tesla-operated Supercharger stations.

Summarized_Articles.Title: Donald Trump Bought a $90,000 Tesla With 37 Recall Notices Against It
Summarized_Articles.Summary: Here's hoping Elon Musk won't have to personally fix President Trump's new EV anytime soon.

Summarized_Articles.Title: Tesla Cybertruck deliveries reportedly on hold because the trim is flying off
Summarized_Articles.Summary: America’s favorite low poly electric truck is facing a new set of problems that don’t have anything to do with people spray painting swastikas or crude comments about Elon Musk on them. Deliveries of the Tesla Cybertruck are on hold while the company addresse…

Summarized_Articles.Title: Elon Musk made more promises about Optimus and Cybercabs at Tesla’s surprise all-hands meeting
Summarized_Articles.Summary: At a surprise all-hands-on meeting Thursday night in Texas, Tesla CEO Elon Musk rallied up his company’s employees as the brand’s public reputation continues to plummet, Business Insider reports. At the livestreamed meeting, Musk told employees to “hang on to…
